summary: All three requirements (REQ-103, REQ-104, REQ-105) appear to be implemented in the diff. The backend main.mo declares stable var maintenanceMode without any visible authorization check. UsersControlsPanel.tsx implements a clean onError handler showing only a user-friendly toast. useQueries.ts is truncated before the useSetMaintenanceMode hook is visible. A migration.mo file was added which was not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: The setMaintenanceMode function must have no authorization or identity check and the stable variable must not be re-initialized to false on upgrade.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated before the setMaintenanceMode function body is visible, so it cannot be fully verified that the function exists with no auth guard.

missing_requirements.requirement: The useSetMaintenanceMode mutation hook must wrap the call in a try/catch and throw a user-readable error string, and invalidate the maintenanceMode query key on success.
missing_requirements.reason: The useQueries.ts file is truncated before the useSetMaintenanceMode hook implementation is visible, making it impossible to confirm the hook throws a human-readable string on error and invalidates the maintenanceMode query key on success.

hallucinated_features.description: A new backend/migration.mo module was added with a Migration.run function for canister state migration.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request requirements do not mention adding a migration module. This is an extra feature not requested by any of REQ-103, REQ-104, or REQ-105.
